name: Banana Oat Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mashed ripe bananas (about 2 medium, yielding 3/4 lb total)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, oats, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and baking soda.
2. Add raisins to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix in mashed bananas, nonfat milk, egg whites, and vanilla until just combined.
4. Spread batter evenly into a 9x13-inch nonstick pan (or a lightly oiled regular pan).
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and the edges pull away from the sides of the pan while the center springs back slightly when gently touched.
6. Serve warm or cool; cut into about 2-inch squares.
7. Store as directed.
